activities_projects.title: Identifying Climbers’ Traits
activities_projects.objective: Recognize simple traits of the climbers
steps: Read the chapter 'Conquering the Summit'
Identify basic traits like brave, careful, or determined
Write the traits in your notebook
Give one example from the story for each trait

activities_projects.title: Listing Main Events
activities_projects.objective: Understand the sequence of the climbing journey
steps: List the main events of the climb in order
Write one sentence for each event
Share your list with a partner

activities_projects.title: Understanding the Story’s Message
activities_projects.objective: Identify the simple lesson from the story
steps: Discuss in class what the story teaches about teamwork and determination
Write a short paragraph summarising the main message

activities_projects.title: Descriptive Writing Practice
activities_projects.objective: Write simple descriptions of the climb
steps: Pick a scene from the climb
Write 3–4 sentences describing what climbers saw, felt, or heard
Share your sentences with classmates

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary Practice
activities_projects.objective: Learn simple new words from the chapter
steps: Find 5 new words in the chapter
Write their meanings
Use each word in a simple sentence

activities_projects.title: Short Dialogue Writing
steps: Pick a short conversation in the story
Rewrite it as a dialogue in your notebook
Include who is speaking
activities_projects.evaluation: Clarity and correctness of dialogue (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Diary Entry
activities_projects.objective: Write a simple diary entry from a climber’s perspective
steps: Imagine you are a climber
Write 4–5 sentences about a day of the climb
Include what you saw and how you felt

activities_projects.title: Simple Sentence Types
activities_projects.objective: Identify declarative, interrogative, and exclamatory sentences
steps: Find 3 declarative, 2 interrogative, and 1 exclamatory sentence in the chapter
Write them in your notebook

activities_projects.title: Group Discussion on Climbing
activities_projects.objective: Share ideas about climbing and teamwork
steps: Discuss in pairs why climbing requires teamwork
Share one interesting point from your discussion with the class
activities_projects.evaluation: Participation and relevance of ideas (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Creative Ending Activity
steps: Think about how the story could end differently
Write 3–4 sentences describing your ending
Share your ending with the class
